name: OpenMLR
description: Self-hosted ML research agent - plans tasks, reads papers, writes drafts, runs experiments

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key (optional if using other providers)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key (optional if using other providers)

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key (optional if using other providers)

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'Deployment complete! Add at least one LLM API key in Settings > Config Vars'
